mapper.insert: INSERT INTO security_facilities ( objt_id, police, polcsttn, fclty_ty, fclty_cd, fclty_nm, adres, rn_adres, telno, ctprvn_cd, sgg_cd, x, y, tmp_x, tmp_y ) VALUES ( #{objtId}, #{police}, #{polcsttn}, #{fcltyTy}, #{fcltyCd}, #{fcltyNm}, #{adres}, #{rnAdres}, #{telno}, #{ctprvnCd}, #{sggCd}, #{x}, #{y}, #{tmpX}, #{tmpY} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE police = VALUES(police), polcsttn = VALUES(polcsttn), fclty_ty = VALUES(fclty_ty), fclty_cd = VALUES(fclty_cd), fclty_nm = VALUES(fclty_nm), adres = VALUES(adres), rn_adres = VALUES(rn_adres), telno = VALUES(telno), ctprvn_cd = VALUES(ctprvn_cd), sgg_cd = VALUES(sgg_cd), x = VALUES(x), y = VALUES(y), tmp_x = VALUES(tmp_x), tmp_y = VALUES(tmp_y), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
